payload.author: claude
payload.body:
AGENT BRIEFING (read before investigating).

FULL CONTEXT: read epic SCP-120 and validation spike SCP-121 first. Validation came back GO with confirmed willingness to pay, but the PRICING UNIT is still open (per-seat / per-agent / per-project / usage). This spike is gated behind real tenants existing (blocked-by relationship to SCP-121 is satisfied; depends in practice on multi-tenancy landing) — lower priority, capture so it isn't an afterthought.

WHERE TO LOOK:
- TREBUCHET security skill (rate-limiting patterns: token bucket / sliding window) — read it for the abuse/quota mechanics.
- src/server.js (where per-tenant + per-principal limits would attach).

STILL OPEN (your job): rate-limiting strategy per tenant + per principal; quotas (events/day, projects, seats, storage, connection count) + how surfaced; abuse model (malicious/runaway client); pricing shape (informed by the agent-collision value story — colliding agents waste tokens, so usage/agent-based pricing may resonate); billing integration (Stripe?) + free-tier boundary.

DELIVERABLE: comment a proposed quota + pricing model here, then spawn child stories once pricing is chosen.
